cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The problem states that John is correct about the current date being 6/19/2019. So today is June 19th, 2019. The question is asking for the date one year ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. Let me break it down. If today is June 19th, 2019, then one year ago would be June 19th, 2018, right? Because subtracting one year from the year part of the date keeps the month and day the same. So 2019 minus 1 is 2018, so the date would be 06/19/2018. But wait, I should check if there's any exception here. For example, if the date was February 29th in a leap year. But June 19th isn't affected by leap years.
